title: WHUN
intro: A clothing brand built around one question: who’s under the clothes?

subject.text: WHUN grew from a simple observation: every person you truly get to know is far more complex than what can be seen from the outside.

difference.text: Clothing is one of the first things we notice, but it is only the surface. What matters is the person underneath — their story, beliefs and thoughts.

anchor.text: The name WHUN was created from the phrase “Who is UNder the clothes?” It turns the brand’s central belief into a question: not what someone wears, but who is wearing it.

identity.text: The identity needed to be recognizable without overshadowing the person. Its role was to support the wearer and the idea behind each drop, rather than become the main focus.

mark.text: The brand’s central question is compressed into four letters: WHUN. The question mark hints at the meaning beneath the name, while the bold, condensed and slanted type gives it a direct streetwear character.

typeColor.text: Because the logo was never meant to dominate, a vivid green took on the role of the brand’s main recognition cue. It makes WHUN identifiable before the name is even read.

inWorld.text: Each drop explores a different idea within the same identity. The wordmark, question and green signal connect the garments, labels, packaging and digital touchpoints.

system.text: One question runs through the entire brand — from the name to every drop. WHUN can change what it says while remaining recognizable, with the person wearing it always at the center.
